---
title: "About"
---

This site is the public home for **Applied Differential Privacy** — lecture decks, self-study
notebooks, assignments, and browser-based interactives.

## Computation library

All plots, simulations, and widgets are imported from
[`libdpy`](https://github.com/applied-dp-course/pub_lib) (published as `pub_lib`). This repository
contains course content, metadata, rendering scripts, and thin wiring only — no duplicated numerical
code.

## Source repository

- Course website: [applied-dp-course/website](https://github.com/applied-dp-course/website)
- Library: [applied-dp-course/pub_lib](https://github.com/applied-dp-course/pub_lib)

## Site stack

Pages are built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and deployed to GitHub Pages. Expensive
interactives use client-side WASM (marimo + Pyodide); the page text loads first, then each widget
starts loading once the document is ready.

## References

For the theory behind the course materials, see the syllabus [topics and prerequisites](syllabus.qmd)
and the linked lecture notebooks.
